purpose: 43 missing adapters to reach Plan target of 80 (after disqualification of 6). Codex reads this as the single source of truth for what to build.
iron_rules: MUST git clone the upstream repo (or pip install the packaged library) - NEVER write your own HTTP/signing/scraping code
Pure HTTP endpoints (e.g. m.weibo.cn, xueqiu.com/hq.json) are BANNED even though they 'just work' - must go through an upstream repo's wrapper function
EXCEPTION: standard RSS / Atom feeds may use feedparser directly (public standard, not custom scraping)
Each adapter = clone + import + 20-30 line mapping layer. If the repo has no usable entry point, mark status=error with reason, do NOT write your own scraper
Use /tmp/as-matrix/ for repo clone paths (e2b default workspace prefix is blocked by committer PII check)
setup.sh time budget <= 180s, run.py time budget <= 30s
Never hardcode cookies/API keys. Return status=needs_login if login required
Must follow ADAPTER_SPEC.md exactly (output schema, status enum, content filtering)

adapters.entry_hint: clone + pip install -e + inspect main script / module for search function. Repo is Python signing reverse.
adapters.known_issue: may need cookie for 461 response; if so return status=needs_login

adapters.entry_hint: JS full-domain crawler. Clone + pip install requirements. Look for apis/ directory or main.py for search entry.
adapters.known_issue: cookie-gated; return status=needs_login if cookie check fails

adapters.entry_hint: pip install xhs package then `from xhs import XhsClient`. Best documented Python SDK.
Go MCP server. Run via docker or `go run`. Alternative: query via MCP JSON-RPC. This is the 12.9k control group (CRITICAL).
adapters.known_issue: needs browser + cookie; try best-effort and mark status=needs_login if not feasible in sandbox

adapters.entry_hint: Standalone x-bogus reverse. Inspect repo for generate_x_bogus + search function.
Multi-platform Docker bundle. For douyin module: clone + locate douyin/ entry + call search.
adapters.known_issue: may need Docker; try python-only mode first

adapters.entry_hint: Python account-targeted downloader. Use its core HTTP client for search if available; else status=empty with note.
Live + danmaku protocol. Will not match keyword queries well. Return status=empty for text queries, note scope is live-only.
Older abandoned Python SDK. pip install, look for search module. Used as staleness control vs Nemo2011.
Kotlin SDK. Invoking from Python requires JVM. If Kotlin binding infeasible in sandbox, mark status=error with reason 'JVM not available'.
Python pip install. Look for WechatArticle class. Requires wx_token + cookie.
Python article scraper. Look for main.py or spider.py.
Sibling of weiboSpider, includes images/videos. pip install requirements, use weibo_crawler module.
Contains weibo crawler + LDA. Use only the crawler submodule, ignore analysis parts.
Scrapy-based. If scrapy runtime too heavy, extract core HTTP logic via scrapy.Request simulation. Otherwise mark error.
x-zse-96 signature reverse. Inspect repo for sign + search functions.
Old-school Scrapy project. Extract HTTP client + parse if possible.
Python API with deep-learning captcha. If TF/torch deps too heavy (>500MB), skip captcha step and call basic search.
JS SDK. Need Node runtime. Call via subprocess node -e or use Python port if exists.
Same repo as douyin G2, but use kuaishou/ module. Shared clone is OK.
Multi-app reverse engineering (includes kuaishou). Look for kuaishou endpoint.
Standalone kuaishou project, stopped maintenance. Try as historical reference.
Small crawler project. Look for kuaishou module.
Claude Code Skill format - reads repo SKILL.md but functions are pure Python. Needs scan-code login - return needs_login if no token.
CLI wrapper. Invoke its search command via subprocess or import its core module.
Audio + text download. For search use case: list episodes if API exposed; else status=empty for keyword queries.
Python audio downloader. Same scope limitation as xyz-dl.
Python crawler. Look for main entry.
Transcription skill. Expensive (whisper/etc). For search: use metadata only, not transcription.
Xiaoyuzhou-to-text converter. Same scope/cost concern as transcription skill.
Aggregated hot-rank scraper (includes 36kr). Use its 36kr scraper module.
Jsoup (Java) or Python. If Java only, mark error. Otherwise use HTTP client.
Small Java project. Likely need rewrite - if Java only, mark error=jvm_required.
Batch user blog to MD. For keyword query, adapt its HTTP client.
Crawler + inverted index. Use its fetch layer only, skip index.
Pageviews spider. Extract its fetch layer; ignore mysql/viz.

adapters.repo: https://rsshub.app/juejin (or juejin official RSS if exposed)
adapters.entry_hint: RSS feedparser adapter. Use feedparser - this is the ONE allowed self-written case per iron rules.
Node automation + API calls. Call its API layer for search.
adapters.known_issue: needs cookie for user actions; but search may be public

adapters.entry_hint: Vue client containing API calls. Extract api.js URL patterns, import via requests/httpx. If that counts as self-writing HTTP, use as reference only for the endpoints Juejin exposes.
Booklet reader. Look for its API client.
Java project. If JVM not feasible, mark error=jvm_required. Otherwise wrap Java tool via subprocess.
Python login + full articles. Look for main search entry.
Humanize API wrapper. pip install + `from xueqiu import api` style. This REPLACES the removed xueqiu__hqjson adapter.

per_adapter_deliverables: Must self-smoke: .venv/bin/python run.py --query '测试' --query-category consumer (just verify argparse works; actual e2b smoke runs later)

post_build_verification.step_1: Claude Code runs `.venv/bin/python tests/e2b-channel-matrix/runner.py --dry-run --only <path_id>` for each new adapter
post_build_verification.step_2: After all 43 adapters written, Claude Code runs full e2b smoke: all adapters x 3 queries x 1 rep = ~240 sandbox invocations, ~$0.30-0.80
